events.title: ITS Transportation Seminar: Advancing Intelligent Transportation Systems with AI
events.organizer: Institute of Transportation Studies (ITS), UC Berkeley College of Engineering
events.description: Jumbi Edulbehram from NVIDIA will present on advancing intelligent transportation systems with AI. Cookie Hour at 2:30 p.m. in the ITS Library (412 McLaughlin Hall).

events.title: Aerospace Seminar: José Hernández, CEO of Tierra Luna Engineering
events.description: José Hernández, former NASA astronaut, shares his journey and insights on the future of aerospace and innovation.

events.title: Bioengineering Seminar: Revealing the Secrets of Metalloenzymes One Snapshot at a Time
events.location: 310 Sutardja Dai Hall (Banatao Auditorium), UC Berkeley
events.description: Dr. Catherine Drennan from MIT will present on molecular mechanisms.

events.title: CLIMB Voleon Seminar: Foundations of Learning Complex Objects in Modern AI
events.organizer: UC Berkeley College of Engineering (CLIMB Voleon)
events.description: Talk with Nina Balcan on foundations of learning complex objects in modern AI.

events.title: Bioengineering Seminar: Reimagining the Student Experience in STEM at the Modern Research University
events.description: Dr. Marc Facciotti from UC Davis will present on reimagining the student experience in STEM.

events.title: Engineering Master's Degree Commencement (Class of 2026)
events.description: Commencement ceremony for Master's degree graduates of the Class of 2026.
